_comment: Webwright task template for cofacts/ai. Copy & fill in per-feature fields.

context_hints.routing: TanStack Start file-based routing. URLs are /chat, /profile, /settings, etc.
context_hints.api: Backend is FastAPI (ADK) at http://localhost:8000. Frontend uses streaming SSE for chat responses.
context_hints.streaming_signal: ADK response is finished when the element with data-testid='assistant-message' no longer contains a spinner or loading class.
context_hints.auth: Google OAuth via NextAuth-compatible session cookie. Storage state is pre-loaded from auth_state_path.

task_template: 載入 {auth_state} 的登入狀態。進入首頁後，{user_action}，靈活等待直到後端 ADK Agent 的 Vertex AI 結構化回應渲染完成（最多 {timeout_seconds} 秒），確認畫面沒有崩潰或錯誤訊息。

example_tasks.user_action: 輸入謠言「喝冰水會中風」並點擊發送
不輸入任何文字直接點擊發送，確認發送按鈕被 disabled 或有適當的錯誤提示
